rationale: The graph-to-media feasibility spike passed, but the Rank-1 learner outcome still has no observed evidence. A small developer comparison remains cheaper and more decision-relevant than authorizing the complete product MVP.

cheaper_sufficient_experiment.description: Run five observed developer comparisons using the verified proof-video concept and an unfamiliar repository architecture task; preserve correct answers, completion times, and contradictory observations.
cheaper_sufficient_experiment.decision_to_unlock: Determine whether the source-linked video improves correct high-level repository orientation enough to justify the complete MVP.
